---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# Category { #json2vec.Category }

```python
Category()
```

Categorical scalar tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Category.type) |  |
| [max_vocab_size](#json2vec.Category.max_vocab_size) |  |
| [p_unavailable](#json2vec.Category.p_unavailable) |  |
| [topk](#json2vec.Category.topk) |  |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [reject_removed_options](#json2vec.Category.reject_removed_options) |  |
| [check_topk](#json2vec.Category.check_topk) |  |

### reject_removed_options { #json2vec.Category.reject_removed_options }

```python
reject_removed_options(data)
```



### check_topk { #json2vec.Category.check_topk }

```python
check_topk()
```
